protocol_override: User approved Codex/GPT self-judge instead of Gemini API.

parsed.signature_a: A computes an integer average or empty-list error, given a list of integers, producing a Result value.
parsed.signature_b: B computes an integer average, given a non-empty list of integers, producing an integer.

same_problem.why: Both compute integer average of a list of integers; the main difference is empty-input handling through Result versus refinement.

same_technique.why: Both use shared technique(s): additive-accumulator, edge-case-empty, loop.

same_domain.why: Both operate on shared domain(s): integer-lists.
